moments.title: UK Summer Holidays Kick Off
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting across the UK this week, with England and Scotland joining Wales in their annual break.

angles.name: Main Network Take
angles.copy: School's out for summer! The long-awaited summer holidays are officially kicking off across the UK this week. Where are you heading for your break?

angles.name: Welsh Local Angle
angles.copy: With the Welsh school summer holidays already underway since late June, who's making the most of the sun and sand? Share your best holiday plans!

moments.title: GuilFest Returns This Week
moments.blurb: GuilFest, the independent two-day music and arts festival, returns to Stoke Park this week, featuring Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Rudimental, ABC, and more.

angles.name: Festival Buzz
angles.copy: GuilFest is back in Stoke Park this week! Ready for a weekend of Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Rudimental and some classic ABC? Let's hear your festival anthems!

angles.name: Artist Spotlight
angles.copy: Sophie Ellis-Bextor is headlining GuilFest this week! From 'Groovejet' to 'Murder on the Dancefloor', what's your favourite track to get the party started?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off Thursday
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from Thursday, July 23rd to Sunday, July 26th, celebrating its 20th anniversary with a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Suffolk, get ready! Latitude Festival kicks off on Thursday for its 20th anniversary. Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Three days to go until Latitude! Beyond the music, what's your favourite part of the Latitude experience – the comedy, the arts, or something else entirely?

moments.title: Truck Festival Starts Thursday
moments.blurb: Oxfordshire's Truck Festival takes place from July 23rd to 26th at Hill Farm, promising another weekend of indie, rock, and alternative music.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Truck Festival! Starting Thursday, it's set to be a massive weekend at Hill Farm. Who's making the trip to Oxfordshire?

angles.name: Indie Anthems
angles.copy: Dreaming of denim and dirt? Truck Festival is almost here! What indie anthem are you hoping to hear live this weekend?

moments.title: Depot In The Castle in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Depot In The Castle, a popular one-day festival, takes place in Cardiff, Wales on Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Cardiff Festival
angles.copy: Cardiff! Depot In The Castle is happening this Saturday, July 25th. Who are you looking forward to seeing at the castle grounds?

angles.name: Welsh Music Scene
angles.copy: Celebrating the Welsh music scene and beyond! Depot In The Castle brings a fantastic lineup to Cardiff this weekend. What's your favourite festival memory from the city?

moments.title: Cat Stevens Turns 78
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam), known for hits like 'Wild World' and 'Father and Son,' celebrates his 78th birthday today.

angles.name: Classic Artist
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the legendary Cat Stevens! Which of his timeless tracks is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Paloma Faith Turns 45
moments.blurb: Award-winning British singer Paloma Faith, known for her soulful voice and chart-topping albums, celebrates her 45th birthday today.

angles.name: UK Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 45th Birthday to the incredible Paloma Faith! What's the Paloma track that always gets you singing?

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez, a global pop superstar, celebrates her 34th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Selena Gomez turns 34! From Disney star to global pop sensation, what's your favourite Selena era?

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, singer, and drummer of the iconic band The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Don Henley turns 79! From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer,' what's your favourite Don Henley moment?

moments.title: Slash Turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist Slash, one of rock's most iconic figures, celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash on Thursday! That top hat, those riffs... what's your favourite Slash guitar solo?

moments.title: Martin Gore Turns 65
moments.blurb: Martin Gore, co-founder, songwriter, and guitarist for synth-pop legends Depeche Mode, celebrates his 65th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Mastermind
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Depeche Mode's Martin Gore this Thursday! His songwriting shaped a generation. What's your ultimate Depeche Mode track?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez Turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music, acting career, and iconic style, celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: JLo Celebration
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on Friday. From 'Jenny from the Block' to her latest hits, what's your favourite JLo moment?

moments.title: Simon Kirke Turns 77
moments.blurb: Simon Kirke, drummer for legendary rock bands Free and Bad Company, celebrates his 77th birthday on Monday, July 28th.

angles.name: Rock Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Next Monday, a true rock legend turns 77! Happy Birthday to Simon Kirke of Free and Bad Company. What's your favourite track featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Geddy Lee Turns 73
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the iconic bassist, vocalist, and keyboardist for Canadian rock legends Rush, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Tuesday, July 29th.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 73rd Birthday to Rush frontman Geddy Lee next Tuesday! A true innovator in rock. What's your favourite Rush epic?

moments.title: Kate Bush Turns 68
moments.blurb: Iconic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush, celebrated for her unique artistic vision, celebrates her 68th birthday on Wednesday, July 30th.

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: Next Wednesday, the incomparable Kate Bush turns 68! From 'Wuthering Heights' to 'Running Up That Hill', her impact is undeniable. What's your favourite Kate Bush track?

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival
moments.blurb: The Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival takes place in the Scottish Highlands from July 30th to August 1st, featuring James and The Human League.

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Highlands, get ready! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival kicks off next Thursday with James and The Human League. Who's heading to 'Bella'?

angles.name: Lineup Hype
angles.copy: James and The Human League at Belladrum next week! Two legendary bands on one stage. Which era of music are you most excited to relive?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival in Derbyshire
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Pikehall, Derbyshire from July 30th to August 2nd, with headliners including The Libertines, Reytons, Two Door Cinema Club, and The Streets.

angles.name: Derbyshire Festival
angles.copy: Derbyshire's ready to rock! Y-Not Festival kicks off next Thursday with The Libertines, The Streets and more. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Indie Rock Lineup
angles.copy: The Libertines, Reytons, Two Door Cinema Club, The Streets – what a lineup for Y-Not next week! Which band are you most hyped to see?

moments.title: Fatboy Slim Turns 63
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, the big beat pioneer, celebrates his 63rd birthday on Friday, July 31st.

angles.name: Dance Music Legend
angles.copy: Next Friday, the legendary Fatboy Slim turns 63! What's your favourite track from the big beat maestro that always gets you moving?

moments.title: Will Champion Turns 48
moments.blurb: Will Champion, the drummer for global stadium rock giants Coldplay, celebrates his 48th birthday on Friday, July 31st.

angles.name: Coldplay Drummer
angles.copy: Next Friday, Coldplay's Will Champion turns 48! A vital part of one of the world's biggest bands. What's your go-to Coldplay anthem?

moments.title: 3v3 Football in Manchester
moments.blurb: A 3v3 UK football tournament is being held in Manchester on Saturday, July 25th, offering fast-paced fun for youth teams.

angles.name: Local Football
angles.copy: Manchester! Get ready for some #FastFeetFun as the 3v3 UK football tournament comes to the city this Saturday. Who's playing or watching?
